description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a modern, open-plan layout and a flat roof. The structure features multiple rooms, including a spacious living area, kitchen, bedrooms, and bathrooms, all arranged around a central corridor. Large glass windows and sliding doors provide ample natural light and connect the interior to outdoor spaces. The backyard includes a wooden pergola, a swimming pool, and a patio area, while the front is enclosed by a low wall and paved entryway. The exterior is finished in white and neutral tones, with some wooden and green accents visible in the outdoor areas. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional spaces, and a seamless transition between indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, open-plan interior, large windows, and outdoor amenities including a pergola and pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved entryway, and a glimpse of the central living area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated layout, large windows, and the pool area at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring the backyard with a wooden pergola, swimming pool, and patio space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the open-plan interior, kitchen, and additional green outdoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding doors
